title: Stack
description: A linear container that lays out its children along a single axis. The single layout primitive in v0.1 (replaces separate Row/Column).

id.description: Optional component identifier. Reserved for future diffing and host-side targeting; not enforced unique in v0.1.

children.description: Child components, in source order. May be empty (useful for conditional rendering).

spacing.description: Gap between children along the main axis. Default: none.

padding.description: Inset around all children. Default: none.

alignment.description: Cross-axis alignment, perpendicular to 'axis'. Default: start. (This is the most common point of confusion: it is NOT main-axis alignment.)
